allow: Bash(DATABASE_URL="file:./dev.db" bun --eval "import { db } from './src/db/client.ts'; const rows = await db.santanderTransaction.findMany\({ where: { OR: [{ description: { contains: 'FASTER PAYMENT' } }, { description: { contains: 'SALARY' } }, { description: { contains: 'PAY' } }] }, select: { id: true, description: true, amount: true, status: true } }\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\(rows.slice\(0, 20\), null, 2\)\);")

Bash(DATABASE_URL="file:./dev.db" bun --eval "import { db } from './src/db/client.ts'; const rows = await db.santanderTransaction.findMany\({ where: { OR: [{ description: { contains: 'FASTER PAYMENT' } }, { description: { contains: 'SALARY' } }, { description: { contains: 'PAY' } }] }, select: { id: true, description: true, moneyIn: true, moneyOut: true, status: true } }\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\(rows.slice\(0, 20\), null, 2\)\);")

Bash(DATABASE_URL="file:./dev.db" bun --eval "import { db } from './src/db/client.ts'; const txns = await db.transaction.findMany\({ where: { description: { contains: 'THROGMORTON' } }, select: { id: true, description: true, amount: true, type: true, categoryId: true } }\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\(txns, null, 2\)\);")

Bash(DATABASE_URL="file:./dev.db" bun --eval "import { db } from './src/db/client.ts'; const result = await db.transaction.updateMany\({ where: { description: { contains: 'THROGMORTON' } }, data: { categoryId: 'cmnvgney80000lku8tkh38z6n' } }\); console.log\(result\);")
Bash(DATABASE_URL="file:./dev.db" bun --eval "import { db } from './src/db/client.ts'; const r = await db.monzoApiTransaction.deleteMany\(\); console.log\('deleted:', r.count\);")

Bash(DATABASE_URL="file:./test.db" bun -e "import { Database } from 'bun:sqlite'; const db = new Database\('./test.db'\); const r = db.query\('SELECT id FROM \\"user\\" WHERE email = ?'\).get\('admin@test.com'\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\(r\)\);")

Bash(NODE_ENV=test DATABASE_URL="file:./test.db" bun -e "import { Database } from 'bun:sqlite'; const db = new Database\('./test.db'\); const cols = db.query\(\\"PRAGMA table_info\('monzo_credential'\)\\"\).all\(\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\(cols.map\(c => c.name\)\)\);")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; r=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(s['error']['message'][:500]\) for t in r.get\('suites',[]\) for s in \(t.get\('specs',[]\) + [ss for su in t.get\('suites',[]\) for ss in su.get\('specs',[]\)]\) if any\(not tr['ok'] for tr in s.get\('tests',[]\) for tr in tr.get\('results',[]\)\)]")

Bash(cmd /c "npx ctx7@latest library Plaid \\"link token transactions sync\\"")
Bash(sqlite3 prisma/dev.db "SELECT \(SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM plaid_transaction\) as staged, \(SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM \\"Transaction\\" WHERE externalId LIKE 'santander-plaid:%'\) as real_txns;")
